summary: Backend-only validation of v2.6.26 Session-3 fixes (paid/organic exposure, sub2 auto-inject, custom traffic_type_param key, invalid-key rejection, and Referrer-Policy: unsafe-url default on tracker 302). All 22 tests in the three v2.6.26 test files pass (1 pre-existing skip unrelated to this session). Full v2.6.* regression suite (v2.6.17/18/19/21/22/23) 107/107 pass. Live curl on preview backend against a freshly created link with referrer_pro_enabled + tiktok:100 pool + traffic_type=paid confirmed: (a) response header 'Referrer-Policy: unsafe-url' present, (b) Location header contained the auto-injected 'sub2=paid' query param plus proper TikTok paid UTM chain. Backend/mongodb RUNNING, /api/public/status=200, admin login OK.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is >25k lines (25442+). Not touched in this session but still flagged from prior iterations — long-term split into modules recommended.
backend still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') in several places — should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers eventually (non-blocking).
test_credentials: admin@krexion.local / KrexionAdmin@2026 via /api/admin/login. Regular user endpoint requires /api/auth/register + activation (users.status='active' or admin approval).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 regular user (testv2626@example.com), 11 test links (name prefix TEST_v2626_*), all deleted after test. DB is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live curl to /api/t/{short_code} only works once per IP; subsequent hits from the same IP return 403 Access Denied by the anti-fraud/duplicate-IP guard (v2.6.16 behavior). If more end-to-end curls are needed, either disable duplicate_timer_enabled at link creation OR clear the rut_burnt_ips + user_fraud_cache + clicks collections between hits. All 129 v2.6.* unit tests pass (+1 pre-existing skip). Version file still reads 2.6.25 in /api/public/status — per user rules do NOT bump backend/VERSION.
rca_of_the_issue: Not applicable — this session was a feature/fix verification, not a bug hunt. Live curl fully confirmed: Referrer-Policy: unsafe-url is now emitted by default on /api/t/{code} 302 responses (fixes referrer-chain leak), and sub2=paid is auto-injected into destination URL when referrer_pro yields a decisive traffic_type verdict.
